summary: Full e2e testing of Royal Cleaning Services platform. All backend APIs (18/18) and all frontend flows passed. Complete 8-step booking flow, admin panel, gallery, contact form, SEO pages all working correctly.

issues: Service dropdown not filled in test (select element not captured) but form submits fine without it as service is optional

critical_code_review_comments: CORS: allow_origins=['*'] is set - acceptable for MVP but consider restricting for production
JWT_SECRET has a fallback default in code - should be mandatory env var only (no default)
Location step in booking shows a search input but no predefined location options appear - user types manually, which is fine but could benefit from suggestions
seed_data_creation: Created test bookings (RCS-202606-8986) and test reviews (TEST_Reviewer) during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: All features working. Backend: 18 tests all pass covering auth, services (9), bookings CRUD, leads, reviews, stats. Frontend: homepage hero/nav/floating contacts work, 8-step booking form completes and creates booking, /booking/success shows confirmation, admin login/dashboard/bookings/services/reviews all work, gallery before/after sliders visible, contact form submits lead, SEO pages /home-cleaning-pune and /sofa-cleaning-pune load, WhatsApp links have target=_blank with correct wa.me/917498026390 URL, mobile bottom bar visible on 390px viewport.
